description: Specifies the sweep angle range for revolve operations (revolvedisk, revolvewasher, revolveshell). Single argument sweeps from 0 to the given angle; two arguments sweep from start to end angle in degrees.
utility: Set sweep angle range for solids of revolution

arguments.name: startAngle
arguments.description: Sweep start angle in degrees (defaults to 0 if only one argument given)

arguments.name: endAngle
arguments.description: Sweep end angle in degrees (defaults to 360)

examples.expression: revolvedisk(at(2,1), view(21,26), region_1, axis(x), fc(blue), sweep(0, 360))
revolvewasher(at(2,1), view(17,16.9), region_1, region_2, axis(x), fc(red), sweep(0, 270))
revolveshell(at(2,1), view(21,26), region_1, axis(y), fc(green), sweep(180))
